name: golang-github-c2sp-wycheproof-dev
title: golang-github-c2sp-wycheproof-dev
summary: tests crypto libraries against known attacks (library)
description:
tests crypto libraries against known attacks (library)
Project Wycheproof is a community managed (https://github.com/C2SP)
repository of test vectors that can be used by cryptography library
developers to test against known attacks, specification inconsistencies,
and other various implementation bugs.
.
This package contains the Go library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-c2sp-wycheproof-dev because tests crypto libraries against known attacks (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-c2sp-wycheproof-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-c2sp-wycheproof-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-c2sp-wycheproof-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
